---
title: q.indicator Roadmap
---

Only open work is listed here.

## Native indicators

- [ ] Confirm the legacy MADEV formula and choose an explicit public name
- [ ] Review the legacy volume-spike ratio and event classification
- [ ] Review the legacy price-spike definition and ATR dependency
- [ ] Add causal-window and batch/online equivalence tests to native indicators

## Providers

- [ ] Evaluate tsfresh as an explicit provider for automated time-series measurements
- [ ] Keep provider dependencies optional and surface actionable installation errors
